600000.name: IDTest Bothhand
descriptionLines: ataque físicos have a random chance to auto-cast Level 1 ^009900Cold Bolt^000000.

600001.name: Boosting Two-Heed Sword
descriptionLines: A special Two-Heed Sword prepared for your rapid growth.
Aumenta a velocidade de ataque (Reduz o atraso após ataque em 1%).
Quando combinado com ^990099Attack Booster Plate^000000, ^990099Attack Booster Manteau^000000, ^990099Attack Booster Greaves^000000 e ^990099Attack Booster Ring^000000:
Aumenta o dano crítico em additional 10%.
Aumenta o dano de ^009900Sonic Wave^000000 em 2%.
Aumenta o dano de ^009900Sonic Wave^000000 em additional 35% for 60 segundos.
Quando combinado com ^990099Ranged Booster Suit^000000, ^990099Ranged Booster Manteau^000000, ^990099Ranged Booster Boots^000000 e ^990099Ranged Booster Brooch^000000:
Diminui o atraso após Habilidade em 15%.
Aumenta o dano de ^009900Dragon Breath^000000 e ^009900Dragon Breath - Water^000000 em 1%.
Aumenta o dano de ^009900Dragon Breath^000000 e ^009900Dragon Breath - Water^000000 em additional 20% for 60 segundos.

600003.name: Espada de Duas Mãos Espiritual
descriptionLines: Uma espada de duas mãos imbuída com o poder de manipular almas.
Aumenta em 5% o dano físico contra monstros da raça ^ff0000Humanoide^000000 (exceto jogadores) e em 5% contra monstros da propriedade ^ff0000Sombrio^000000.
Aumenta em 5% adicionais o dano físico contra monstros da raça ^ff0000Humanoide^000000 (exceto jogadores) e em 5% adicionais contra monstros da propriedade ^ff0000Sombrio^000000.
Aumenta em 10% adicionais o dano físico contra monstros da raça ^ff0000Humanoide^000000 (exceto jogadores) e em 10% adicionais contra monstros da propriedade ^ff0000Sombrio^000000.

600004.name: Dragonic Slayer
descriptionLines: A great sword that is said to have been used em a dragon slayer in the past.
It resonates with Ancient Hero's Boots.
Increase ^009900Dragon Breath^000000 e ^009900Dragon Breath - Water^000000 em 5%.
Diminui o atraso após Habilidade de todas as habilidades em 10%.
Increase Ataque á distânciad physical o dano em 10%.
Chance aleatória to gain VIT + 20 e increase Ataque á distânciad physical o dano em 10% for 7 segundos ao causar dano físico.

600008.name: Hypocrisy Edge
descriptionLines: A massive sword that decorated the corners of the Barmund Mansion.
It was terribly transformed em the magic interference device installed em the Illusionians.
Aumenta o dano de ^009900Wind Cutter^000000 em 10%.
Aumenta o dano de ^009900Wind Cutter^000000 em additional 10%.
Diminui o atraso após Habilidade de todas as habilidades em 10%.
Aumenta o dano de ^009900Wind Cutter^000000 em additional 15%.

600009.name: Patent Oriental Sword
descriptionLines: An ancient sword said has cut many evil souls in eastern.
He recovered his former glory e began to display his natural abilities.
It resonates with Great Hero Boots.
Aumenta o dano de ^009900Sonic Wave^000000 em 10%.
Aumenta a velocidade de ataque (Reduz o atraso após ataque em 10%).
Chance aleatória de conjurar automaticamente Level 2 ^009900Sonic Wave^000000 when dealing de ataques físicos corpo a corpo.

600011.name: Illusion Death Guidance
descriptionLines: A cursed weapon exists only for the destruction of all living being. The curse of this sword even affects the wielder that leads the person to misery.
Aumenta o dano de ^009900Storm Blast^000000 em 20%.
ataque físicos have a 3% chance to recover 50 HP per refine rate per segundo for 4 segundos.
Se o ^0000FFNível de refinamento^000000 de ^990099Illusion Death Guidance^000000 e ^990099Illusion Chain Mail^000000 each is ^0000FF+7 ou superior^000000:
Se o ^0000FFNível de refinamento total do conjunto^000000 for ^0000FF+18^000000:
Aumenta o dano de ^009900Storm Blast^000000 em 20%.
Se o ^0000FFNível de refinamento total do conjunto^000000 for ^0000FF+22^000000:
Aumenta o dano físico contra ^0000BBÁgua^000000 elemental enemies e FF0000Fish^000000 raças de monstros em 15%.

600012.name: Ignition Wave Booster Two-Heed Sword
descriptionLines: A Two-Heed Sword designed to help adventurers grow.
ATQ +3 (Applies até o nível de base 195)
Aumenta a velocidade de ataque (Reduz o atraso após ataque em 1%).
Aumenta o dano de ^009900Ignition Break^000000 e ^009900Sonic Wave^000000 em 25%.
High chance de conjurar automaticamente ^009900Sonic Wave^000000, skill level based on learned level, when dealing ataque físicos.
Aumenta o dano físico contra all sized enemies em 15%.
Aumenta o dano de ^009900Ignition Break^000000 e ^009900Sonic Wave^000000 em additional 15%.

600013.name: Fortified Claymore
descriptionLines: A weapon enhanced em using Etel's magical power.
New abilities that had not been discovered before began to emerge.
Aumenta o dano de ^009900Storm Slash^000000 em 5%.

600014.name: Penitentia Ensis
descriptionLines: A sword containing the pain of bereavement.
Increases o dano of ^009900Storm Slash^000000 by 10%.
Increases o dano of ^009900Ignition Break^000000 by 3%.
Decreases Variable Casting Time of all skills by 10%.
Increases o dano of ^009900Ignition Break^000000 by additional 25%.
Decreases ^009900Ignition Break^000000 skill cooldown by 0.7 seconds.
[Grade C]: o dano of ^009900Storm Slash^000000 +8%, P.ATK +1.
[Grade B]: o dano of ^009900Storm Slash^000000 +12%, POW +2.

600015.name: Espada Larga do Comandante
descriptionLines: Uma espada de duas mãos imbuída com o poder de espíritos malignos.
Aumenta o dano contra monstros da raça^ff0000Planta^000000 e de elemento ^ff0000Vento^000000 em 5%.
Aumenta o dano contra monstros da raça ^ff0000Planta^000000 e de elemento^ff0000Vento^000000 em +5%.
Aumenta o dano contra monstros da raça ^ff0000Planta^000000 e de elemento^ff0000Vento^000000 em +10%.

600016.name: Thanos Greatsword-AD
descriptionLines: Thanos' greatsword remodeled with the addition of Tim Artnard's technology.
ataque físicos have a random chance to recover 2500 HP and 50 SP every second for 4 seconds.
Increases o dano of ^009900Wind Cutter^000000 by 10%.
Increases Attack Speed (Decreases After Attack Delay by 10%).
Increases o dano of ^009900Wind Cutter^000000 by additional 20%.
ataque físicos have a certain chance to auto cast Level 2 ^009900Wind Cutter^000000. (If you learned a higher Level, it will auto cast that Level instead.)
Increases physical o dano against all sized enemies by 15%.
Increases melee physical o dano by 15%.
[Grade D]: ATK +2%, o dano of ^009900Servant Weapon^000000 +10%.

600017.name: Adulter Fides Two-Handed Sword
descriptionLines: A two-handed sword filled with false beliefs.

Increases o dano of ^009900Wind Cutter^000000 by additional 20%.
Decreases After Skill Delay of all skills by 10%.
Increases o dano of ^009900Wind Cutter^000000 by additional 25%.
Increases melee physical o dano by 15%.

600018.name: Vivatus Fides Two-Handed Sword
descriptionLines: A two-handed sword reborn with the power of true faith through a ritual of purification.

Increases o dano of ^009900Wind Cutter^000000 by additional 20%.
